---
description: "Lukas Mayer's Curriculum Vitae - Education at the University of California (UCI), Irvine, University of Warwick (UoW), University of Stirling (UoS); Research Experience at the University of California, Irvine (UCI), University of Bath (UoB), and University of Stirling (UoS); Publications in scientific Journals; Awards and Honors for his outstanding achievements; Miscellaneous information about his participation in various other activities to further develop himself"
format: 
  html:
    self-contained: true
    theme: [darkly, theme-dark.scss]
  pdf: 
    documentclass: article
    geometry:
      - top=10mm
      - left=15mm
      - right=15mm
      - bottom=5mm
      - heightrounded
    fontfamily: libertine
    colorlinks: true
    fontsize: '16'
    include-in-header: 
      text: |
        \usepackage{multicol}
        \usepackage{tabularx}
        \usepackage{lipsum}
        \usepackage{graphicx}
        \usepackage{hyperref}
        \usepackage{libertine}
        \pagestyle{empty}
        \setlength{\multicolsep}{2pt plus 1.0pt minus 0.75pt}% 50% of original values
        \setlength{\columnsep}{3em}
  
---

<!-- TITLE -->
\begin{huge}\begin{center}{\bf Lukas William Mayer}\end{center}\end{huge}

<!-- CONTACT INFO -->
\begin{center}
\href{mailto:willuk@vivaldi.net}{willuk@vivaldi.net} ∙ \href{https://steyvers.socsci.uci.edu/madlab/}{Lab} ∙ \href{https://github.com/lukmayer}{Github} ∙ \href{https://lukmayer.github.io}{Website}
\end{center}



# Education 
\hrule

\begin{minipage}{0.05\textwidth}
  \includegraphics[trim=0 11mm 0 0,width=\textwidth]{images/uci.png}
\end{minipage}
\hfill 
\begin{minipage}{0.95\textwidth}
  \begin{tabularx}{\textwidth}{p{12cm} X}
    \textbf{PhD Cognitive Science } & \textbf{2028 (Expected)}  \\
    \textit{University of California, Irvine} & \textit{Irvine, California, USA}  \\
  \end{tabularx}
\end{minipage}

\begin{tabularx}{\textwidth}{p{1.4cm} X}
    \textbf{Thesis:} & Bayesian modelling of inversion problems in human-AI interaction (preliminary title) \\
    \textbf{Advisor:} & Professor Mark Steyvers  \\
    \textbf{Focus:} & Computational modelling of human problem-solving abilities and alignment of AI systems with human cognition  \\
  \end{tabularx}
  
\vspace{0.5cm}

\begin{minipage}{0.05\textwidth}
  \includegraphics[trim=0 11mm 0 0,width=\textwidth]{images/warwick.jpg}
\end{minipage}
\hfill 
\begin{minipage}{0.95\textwidth}
  \begin{tabularx}{\textwidth}{p{12cm} X}
    \textbf{MSc Behavioral and Data Science (Distinction)} & \textbf{2022}  \\
    \textit{University of Warwick} & \textit{Coventry, England, UK}  \\
  \end{tabularx}
\end{minipage}

\begin{tabularx}{\textwidth}{p{1.5cm} X}
    \textbf{Thesis:} & Cognition-Inspired Heuristics Improve Machine-Learning Predictions in Multi-Attribute Multi-Alternative Choice  \\
    \textbf{Advisor:} & Professor Nick Chater  \\
    \textbf{Awards:} & \textbf{Best Overall Score}: Behavioral and Data Science (equivalent to \textbf{Summa Cum Laude})  \\
    \textbf{Focus:} & Unifying models from computational cognitive science and machine learning  \\
  \end{tabularx}

\vspace{0.5cm}

\begin{minipage}{0.05\textwidth}
  \includegraphics[trim=0 11mm 0 0,width=\textwidth]{images/stirling.png}
\end{minipage}
\hfill 
\begin{minipage}{0.95\textwidth}
  \begin{tabularx}{\textwidth}{p{12cm} X}
    \textbf{BSc with Honors Psychology (First-Class)} & \textbf{2021}  \\
    \textit{University of Stirling} & \textit{Stirling, Scotland, UK}  \\
  \end{tabularx}
\end{minipage}

\begin{tabularx}{\textwidth}{p{1.5cm} X}
    \textbf{Thesis:} & Cooperation does not improve selective and/or sustained attention  \\
    \textbf{Advisors:} & Dr. John Michael and Dr. Ross Goutcher  \\
    \textbf{Awards:} & \textbf{Peter McEwan Prize} for the Best Single Honours Psychology Student (equivalent to \textbf{Summa Cum Laude})  \\
    \phantom{} & \textbf{Alan Baddeley Prize} for the Best Psychology Dissertation  \\
    \textbf{Focus:} & Measuring cognitive abilities in online games  \\
  \end{tabularx}




# Research Experience 
\hrule


\begin{minipage}{0.05\textwidth}
  \includegraphics[trim=0 11mm 0 0,width=\textwidth]{images/bath.png}
\end{minipage}
\hfill 
\begin{minipage}{0.95\textwidth}
  \begin{tabularx}{\textwidth}{p{12cm} X}
    \textbf{Research Assistant: Center for Research and Evidence on Security Threats } & \textbf{2022 - 2023 }  \\
    \textit{University of Bath, School of Management} & \textit{Bath, England, UK}  \\
  \end{tabularx}
\end{minipage}


Conducted large-scale mixed methods study concerned with the prediction of online group communications which translate into real-world actions

**Principal Investigator**: Professor Adam Joinson

\vspace{0.5cm}

\begin{minipage}{0.05\textwidth}
  \includegraphics[trim=0 11mm 0 0,width=\textwidth]{images/stirling.png}
\end{minipage}
\hfill 
\begin{minipage}{0.95\textwidth}
  \begin{tabularx}{\textwidth}{p{12cm} X}
    \textbf{Research Assistant: Centre for Cognition in Complex Environments} & \textbf{2019 - 2021}  \\
    \textit{University of Stirling, Department of Psychology} & \textit{Stirling, Scotland, UK}  \\
  \end{tabularx}
\end{minipage}


Research project work around face matching and concealed identity recognition

**Principal Investigator**: Dr. Ailsa E. Millen

\vspace{0.5cm}

\begin{minipage}{0.05\textwidth}
  \includegraphics[trim=0 11mm 0 0,width=\textwidth]{images/stirling.png}
\end{minipage}
\hfill 
\begin{minipage}{0.95\textwidth}
  \begin{tabularx}{\textwidth}{p{12cm} X}
    \textbf{Research Assistant: Centre for Cognition in Complex Environments} & \textbf{2021}  \\
    \textit{University of Stirling, Department of Psychology} & \textit{Stirling, Scotland, UK}  \\
  \end{tabularx}
\end{minipage}

Automated video analysis for discrimination learning in lumpfish

**Principal Investigator**: Dr. Jamie Murray



# Publications {#publications}
\hrule

Karny, S., **Mayer, L. W.**, Ayoub, J., Song, M., Su, H., Tian, D., Moradi-Pari, E., & Steyvers, M. (2024). Learning with AI Assistance: A Path to Better Task Performance or Dependence? *Proceedings of the ACM Collective Intelligence Conference, 10–17*. https://doi.org/10.1145/3643562.3672610

Steyvers, M., Tejeda, H., Kumar, A., Belem, C., Karny, S., Hu, X., **Mayer, L. W.**, & Smyth, P. (2024). The Calibration Gap between Model and Human Confidence in Large Language Models. arXiv preprint arXiv:2401.13835.

**Mayer, L. W.**, Bocheva, D., Hinds, J., Brown, O., Piwek, L., Ellis, D. (under Review) Waste not want not: Computational methods to maximise attendance in group research. *Behavior Research Methods*.



# Miscellaneous
\hrule

\begin{minipage}{0.05\textwidth}
  \includegraphics[trim=0 11mm 0 0,width=\textwidth]{images/uva.png}
  \phantom{}
\end{minipage}
\hfill 
\begin{minipage}{0.95\textwidth}
  \begin{tabularx}{\textwidth}{p{12cm} X}
    \textbf{Digital Methods Initiative Winter School - The use and misuse of Open Source Intelligence} & \textbf{2023 }  \\
    \textit{University of Amsterdam, Amsterdam, North Holland, The Netherlands} & \phantom{}  \\
  \end{tabularx}
\end{minipage}

\vspace{0.5cm}

\begin{minipage}{0.05\textwidth}
  \includegraphics[trim=0 11mm 0 0,width=\textwidth]{images/tubingen.jpg}
  \phantom{}
\end{minipage}
\hfill 
\begin{minipage}{0.95\textwidth}
  \begin{tabularx}{\textwidth}{p{12cm} X}
    \textbf{International Interdisciplinary Computational Cognitive Science Summer School} & \textbf{2023 }  \\
    \textit{University of Tübingen, Tübingen, Baden-Württemberg, Germany} & \phantom{}  \\
  \end{tabularx}
\end{minipage}

\vspace{0.5cm}

\begin{minipage}{0.05\textwidth}
  \includegraphics[trim=0 11mm 0 0,width=\textwidth]{images/neuromatch}
\end{minipage}
\hfill 
\begin{minipage}{0.95\textwidth}
  \begin{tabularx}{\textwidth}{p{12cm} X}
    \textbf{NeuroMatch Academy Summer School: Deep Learning} & \textbf{2022}  \\
    \textit{NeuroMatch Academy, Los Angeles, CA, USA} & \phantom{}  \\
  \end{tabularx}
\end{minipage}
